title: AI coding tools and deep reading
first_prompt: ==Vibe-coding==[^1] is now *de rigeur*. Even experienced programmers are using Claude Code or Cursor, though the way they're able to use AI coding tools is orders of magnitude better than inexperience
summary: The conversation centered on refining an essay arguing that the increasing sophistication of AI coding tools fundamentally changes the culture and structure of technical writing, drawing parallels to deep reading theory and citing authors like Wolf and Dunbar. After the assistant praised the essay's core argument, Irwin requested a detailed structural edit, which the assistant then provided in a marked-up document. The exchange concluded with the assistant troubleshooting technical rendering issues and successfully delivering the revised draft as a properly styled HTML file using the Literata/Outfit/Sono stack.
